localProductMission: Provide a polished, professional marketing website for ETL GIS Consulting LLC that clearly communicates geospatial consulting services, project successes, and contact pathways without adding friction to discovery.

governance.behaviorPreservation: GeoAware OS governance documentation must not change application behavior, UI behavior, dependencies, or runtime source code unless a future task explicitly requests implementation work.
designPrinciples: Geography-first experiences that orient people before asking them to act.
Calm interfaces that reduce cognitive load and make spatial context easy to understand.
Quiet guidance that supports discovery without overwhelming users.
Purposeful restraint in copy, visuals, animation, and technical complexity.
Product coherence across mission, content, interaction, and geospatial storytelling.

qualityGate.performance: Maintain lightweight, responsive pages and avoid unnecessary runtime cost.
qualityGate.accessibility: Preserve semantic structure, readable content, keyboard usability, and inclusive interaction patterns.
qualityGate.restraint: Add only what serves the mission; avoid unnecessary dependencies, visual noise, and behavioral churn.
qualityGate.productCoherence: Ensure documentation, content, and interface decisions align with ETL GIS Consulting LLC's geography-first consulting mission.
